completed_work: Wired ask_provider.py and compare_providers.py through the resolver.
Added tests for defaulting and explicit zero override.
Verified with full pytest suite: 191 passed.
key_decisions: Centralize provider warning-cap default resolution in prompt_context.py.
Apply the default only to provider latest-context paths when require_admission=True and no explicit cap is provided.
next_actions: Run one admission-gated provider comparison without explicitly passing --max-warning-admissions to verify the default appears in the saved context manifest.
risks: The default now changes provider admission-gated behavior when callers omit the warning cap; manifests make the resolved policy auditable.
summary_text: AI-Lab implemented the synthesized provider latest-context warning-cap default. prompt_context.py now exposes resolve_provider_warning_admission_cap, which returns explicit max_warning_admissions values unchanged, defaults to 1 when require_admission=True and no cap is set, and returns None when require_admission=False and no cap is set. ask_provider.py and compare_providers.py use this resolver, keeping the behavior scoped to provider latest-context paths. build_context_pack.py remains explicit. Tests cover resolver behavior, provider defaulting, and explicit zero-cap override. The full suite passed with 191 tests.
